task_completion.description: Agent logged into the DHIS2 system using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the DHIS2 dashboard or home screen after a successful login.

task_completion.description: Agent added the French translation for 'ANC 1st visit'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the DHIS2 translation dialog for the data element 'ANC 1st visit', with the French ('fr') locale selected and 'CPN 1ère visite' entered for the Name property.

task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the DHIS2 translation dialog for the data element 'ANC 2nd visit', with the French ('fr') locale selected and 'CPN 2ème visite' entered for the Name property.

task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the DHIS2 translation dialog for the data element 'ANC 4th visit', with the French ('fr') locale selected and 'CPN 4ème visite' entered for the Name property.

task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the DHIS2 translation dialog for the data element 'ANC IPT 1st dose', with the French ('fr') locale selected and 'CPN TPI 1ère dose' entered for the Name property.

task_completion.description: Agent created a documentation file listing the translated data elements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing a text editor or terminal open with the file `/home/ga/Desktop/translation_log.txt` containing a list of the translated data elements.

integrity.description: Agent used the DHIS2 web interface to enter translations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser open to the DHIS2 application, navigating through the Maintenance app to Data Elements and opening translation dialogs, rather than using terminal API commands.

integrity.description: Agent actually entered the translations into the DHIS2 system, not just the text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The translation dialogs in DHIS2 are visibly filled out and saved during the trajectory.

integrity.description: The log file was created manually by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening a text editor or using terminal commands to create and populate the translation_log.txt file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target locale is 'fr' (French). The required translations for the 'Name' property are: 'ANC 1st visit' -> 'CPN 1ère visite', 'ANC 2nd visit' -> 'CPN 2ème visite', 'ANC 3rd visit' -> 'CPN 3ème visite', 'ANC 4th visit' -> 'CPN 4ème visite', 'ANC IPT 1st dose' -> 'CPN TPI 1ère dose'. The log file must be saved exactly at /home/ga/Desktop/translation_log.txt. The DHIS2 instance uses real-world demo data from Sierra Leone.
